2.4.6-headings-and-labels.remarks: Facet heading uses field display name (e.g., 'Brand'). Search input, group, checkboxes all include facet name in labels.
Same pattern as search category facet. Heading, search, group, and category buttons all descriptively labeled with facet name.
Heading 'Price' is descriptive. Min/max inputs labeled 'Enter a minimum/maximum numerical value for the Price facet'. Apply button descriptive.
Same as atomic-search-box. Input has descriptive aria-label with suggestions and submit instructions.
Combobox labeled 'Sort by'. Option labels describe sort criteria.
Navigation landmark 'Pagination'. Radio buttons 'Page N'. Previous/Next buttons descriptive.
Group and radiogroup labeled 'Products per page'. Descriptive label for the control purpose.
H1 'Sort & Filter', H2 'Sort'/'Filters' describe sections. Sort combobox labeled 'Sort by'. Facets within modal use descriptive labels.
Heading 'Customers often buy' describes section topic. Region landmark matches heading. Product images have descriptive alt text 'Image 1 out of 1 for [name]'. Ratings labeled 'N stars out of 5'.
